name: opennori
description: Repo-native Plan, Implement, Verify, and Finish workflow with outcome-driven completion.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-native agent workflow with outcome-driven completion.
interface.longDescription: OpenNori carries a coding goal from confirmed results to verified Git delivery. It plans before implementation, uses a fresh Codex reviewer by default, records what actually passed or failed, verifies the delivered commit or pull request, preserves reusable project knowledge, and refuses completion while a required result is still missing. Compact status, bounded context, safe upgrades, and project-scoped history keep later conversations useful without turning chat history into project truth.
defaultPrompt: Use OpenNori for a new goal. Ask me for the goal before creating a Task.
